import React from 'react'; const Dashboard = () => { return (

PLACEMENT DASHBOARD

892

Total Companies

156

Placement Rate

78.5%

Recent Activity

New Students

  • Rahul Kumar - Computer Science
  • Priya Sharma - Information Technology
  • Amit Patel - Computer Science
  • Neha Gupta - Electronics Engineering

New Companies

  • Tech Solutions Inc - Software Development
  • Global Systems - IT Services
  • Data Analytics Pro - Data Science
  • CloudTech Industries - Cloud Computing
); }; export default Dashboard;
